name: Lincoln National Corporation Depositary Shares Each Representing a 1/1000th Interest in a Share of 9.000% Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock Series D
summary: Lincoln National Corporation Depositary Shares Each Representing a 1/1000th Interest in a Share of 9.000% Non-Cumulative Preferred Stock Series D represents ownership in preferred stock issued by Lincoln National Corporation. Lincoln National Corporation is a financial services company that offers a range of wealth protection, accumulation, and retirement income products. The company is based in Radnor, Pennsylvania.
